nodes.context: African-American organized crime syndicate in New York City that controlled the heroin trade in Harlem during the 1970s.
Italian-American Mafia family in New York City that supplied raw heroin to The Council.
Criminal gang allied with The Council according to infobox.
Rival gang to The Council according to infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The Council was heavily connected to the Italian-American Mafia in New York City, where Matthew Madonna of the Lucchese crime family supplied the group with raw heroin
edges.context: Lucchese crime family supplied raw heroin to The Council.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Lucchese Crime Family , East Harlem Purple Gang
edges.context: East Harlem Purple Gang is listed as an ally of The Council in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Frank Lucas gang, various gangs in New York City including their allies
edges.context: Frank Lucas gang is listed as a rival of The Council in the infobox.
